trust.pillar1Desc: Clear processes, honest timelines, and full visibility at every stage of the recruitment journey.
trust.pillar2Desc: We prepare professionals culturally, linguistically, and professionally for long-term success.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: About PhilManPower
about.para1: PhilManPower was founded to transform international recruitment — connecting European employers with qualified Filipino professionals through fair, structured, and reliable processes.
about.para2: From our own experience, we know: successful international recruitment doesn't end with signing a contract. We focus on quality over quantity, clear processes, and long-term partnerships that benefit both employers and professionals.
about.value2: Realistic preparation instead of false promises
about.altImage: Filipino healthcare team in a modern European hospital

industries.label: Our Expertise
industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.subtitle: We recruit specifically for sectors with sustained demand across Europe, providing professionals who are ready to contribute from day one.
industries.healthcareDesc: Registered nurses, certified care professionals, and healthcare assistants prepared for European standards.
industries.hospitalityDesc: Skilled chefs, service staff, and hotel professionals trained for premium European establishments.
industries.technicalDesc: Certified welders, industrial mechanics, construction workers, and engineering professionals.

process.label: How It Works
process.title: Our Recruitment Process
process.subtitle: A structured six-step process designed to minimize risk and maximize success for every placement.
process.step1Desc: We analyze your staffing needs, timelines, and specific requirements in a free initial consultation.
process.step2Desc: We identify and pre-screen qualified candidates from our vetted talent pool in the Philippines.
process.step3Desc: Selected professionals undergo intensive language and vocational training with our certified partners.
process.step4Desc: We handle all documentation, translations, credential recognition, and visa processing.
process.step5Desc: Comprehensive relocation support including travel, housing guidance, and administrative setup.
process.step6Desc: Ongoing support for employers and professionals to ensure a smooth start and long-term success.

whyChooseUs.label: Our Advantage
whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose PhilManPower
whyChooseUs.subtitle: International recruitment fails when preparation is lacking. We've built our entire process around getting it right.
whyChooseUs.point1Desc: Our international team brings years of cross-border recruitment expertise across healthcare, hospitality, and industry.
whyChooseUs.point2Desc: Every candidate undergoes rigorous background checks, skills assessments, and professional verification.
whyChooseUs.point3Desc: Candidates receive intensive German language training up to B2 level before arrival, ensuring workplace readiness.
whyChooseUs.point4Desc: We manage the complete documentation, credential recognition, and visa process end-to-end.
whyChooseUs.point5Desc: Our structured approach yields a 98% placement success rate with strong long-term retention.
whyChooseUs.point6Desc: Dedicated account managers provide continuous support after placement for lasting integration.

regions.label: Our Presence
regions.title: Countries We Operate In
regions.subtitle: We are present where our clients and professionals need us — with dedicated contacts in Germany, Austria, and Spain.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Trusted by European Employers
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from healthcare facilities, hotels, and industrial companies who rely on PhilManPower for their staffing needs.
testimonials.1text: PhilManPower delivered exactly what we needed — qualified nursing professionals who were language-ready and culturally prepared. The integration was seamless.
testimonials.2text: Finding skilled hospitality staff in Austria has been challenging for years. PhilManPower's structured approach and quality candidates have been a game changer for our operations.
testimonials.3text: The technical professionals we received were thoroughly vetted and well-prepared. PhilManPower's end-to-end support made the entire process remarkably smooth.
testimonials.4text: We've worked with several recruitment agencies, but PhilManPower stands out for their commitment to quality and long-term success. Our retention rate has been exceptional.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about working with PhilManPower.
faq.q1: How long does the recruitment process take?
faq.a1: The typical timeline from initial consultation to a professional's arrival is 4–8 months, depending on the industry, visa processing times, and language training requirements. We provide a detailed timeline during our initial assessment.
faq.q2: What is the visa process for Filipino professionals?
faq.a2: We handle the complete visa process, including document preparation, credential recognition, embassy appointments, and work permit applications. Our team manages all legal requirements to ensure full compliance with EU and national immigration laws.
faq.q3: What qualifications do the candidates have?
faq.a3: All candidates hold relevant professional qualifications from accredited institutions. Nurses are licensed and registered, chefs hold culinary certifications, and technical professionals carry trade certifications. We verify all credentials before recommendation.
faq.q4: What level of German language proficiency do candidates achieve?
faq.a4: We work with certified language institutes to prepare candidates to at least B1 level, with most healthcare professionals reaching B2 before their arrival. Language training continues during the integration phase.
faq.a5: Our fee structure is transparent and depends on the number of placements, industry, and specific service requirements. We provide a detailed cost breakdown during the consultation — the initial assessment is free and non-binding.
faq.q6: What support do you provide after placement?
faq.a6: We offer comprehensive post-placement support for both employers and professionals, including integration coaching, cultural orientation, administrative assistance, and ongoing contact to resolve any issues during the first months.
